summary: Data Integrity Dashboard & Customer Portal Enhancements testing complete. All 16 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: Data Integrity Dashboard shows health score gauge (70), compliance cards (Missing VRN/BRN, Pending EFD), order health cards (Stuck Orders, Overdue Invoices, Orphan Orders), fulfillment cards. View buttons load detail records. Data Integrity accessible from sidebar under Reports & Analytics. Customer portal OrderDetailPageV2 shows Documents section with Quote and Invoice links.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Integrity Dashboard & Customer Portal Enhancements verified. Key features: (1) Data Integrity Summary API - GET /api/admin/data-integrity/summary returns health_score (0-100), total_issues, categories (compliance, orders, fulfillment) with counts for missing_vrn, missing_brn, pending_efd, stuck_orders, orphan_orders, overdue_invoices, unconfirmed_deliveries. (2) Data Integrity Details API - GET /api/admin/data-integrity/details/{category} returns list of records for stuck_orders, overdue_invoices, pending_efd, missing_vrn, unconfirmed_deliveries. (3) Data Integrity Dashboard UI - Shows health score gauge, compliance/order health/fulfillment cards with View buttons that load detail records. (4) Sidebar Navigation - Data Integrity link added under Reports & Analytics section. (5) Customer Portal OrderDetailPageV2 - Shows Documents section with links to Quote and Invoice. Completion CTA shows for dispatched/shipped/in_transit orders. Completion summary shows for completed orders with receiver_name. Test order: 69b192362d4f87d8d578845e (completed, has quote QTN-20260311-B95327 and invoice INV-20260311-11459A).

details: Response contains categories: compliance, orders, fulfillment
Compliance section shows Missing VRN (0), Missing BRN (0), Pending EFD (2)
Order Health section shows Stuck Orders (39), Overdue Invoices (5), Orphan Orders (190)
Fulfillment section shows Unconfirmed Deliveries (0), Total Delivery Notes (37)
View buttons load detail records in expandable list
Data Integrity link visible under Reports & Analytics
Completion CTA not shown for completed orders (correct behavior)
